commands.review_summary:
Adds in-memory Discord outbound anchors, READY/RESUMED REST backfill through the existing message handler, reply-reference hydration hardening, Discord regression tests, and a changed-lane expectation update.

Reproducibility: no. not as a live failure: current-main source lacks READY/RESUMED reconnect backfill and the PR models the gap with regression tests, but no live Discord Gateway reconnect was exercised against main or this PR head.
